chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 03 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.22/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.23/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 27.01.2026 Mr. Ahmed Mehran Goraya, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Learned counsel appearing for the Petitioner has impugned order dated 26.12.2025 passed in Crl. Misc. Appln. No.5464 of 2025 by Additional Sessions Judge-II / Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur Mirs. Learned counsel has contended that despite the fact that the application u/s 22-A and 22-B Cr.PC was allowed; however, the respondents are not complying with the orders passed therein and are continuously harassing the petitioner. At this juncture, learned counsel for the petitioner states that he would be satisfied if instant petition is disposed of by directing the respondents to comply with the order dated 26.12.2025 in letter and spirit. Order accordingly. Petition disposed of. Judge ARBROHI
